message:
feat(onboard): mark-done also updates reflection processed log

Problem:
- "cm onboard mark-done <session>" only updated onboard state
- Session could still be picked up by "cm reflect" auto-processing
- User intent is "I'm done with this session" - not just onboarding

Solution:
- When mark-done runs, also append to ProcessedLog
- Uses same tracking mechanism as orchestrator post-reflection
- Session now excluded from both onboard sample AND reflect
- Prevents duplicate processing of manually-reviewed sessions

Implementation:
- Import ProcessedLog and getProcessedLogPath from tracking.js
- Import now() utility for timestamp
- After markSessionProcessed(), also call processedLog.append()
- Set deltasGenerated: 0 (no rules extracted in manual marking)

This creates consistency: a marked session behaves identically
to one that was auto-processed with zero deltas generated.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
